name: 1-2-3-4-5 Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the butter and sugar until well combined.
2. Add the eggs to the mixture and continue stirring until incorporated.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Pour in the milk, then add the baking powder.
5. Gently fold in the flour until just combined.
6. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Place the batter in a greased cake pan and bake for 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean with slight bounce-back.
